
---
title: "Final project_2026"
format:
  dashboard:
    pages: true
    css: styles.css   # 👈 AÑADE ESTA LÍNEA
---



```{python}
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import country_converter as coco
```






## load Population

```{python}
pop = pd.read_csv(r"C:\Users\julia\OneDrive\Documents\GitHub\proyecto\wWorld_pop_Total.csv")

```

## Load Area

```{python}
area = pd.read_csv(r"C:\Users\julia\OneDrive\Documents\GitHub\proyecto\World_Area.csv")
```


## Rename Columns Population
```{python}
pop = pop.rename(columns={
    "geo": "Country",
    "time": "Year",
    "sp_pop_totl": "Total_Population"
})

```


## Rename Columns for area 
```{python}

area = area.rename(columns={
    "geo": "Country",
    "time": "Year",
    "ag_lnd_totl_k2": "Area"
})

```


## Remove leading and trailing spaces from column names


```{python}
pop.columns = pop.columns.str.strip()
area.columns = area.columns.str.strip()
```


## Rename Country to ISO3
```{python}
area = area.rename(columns={"Country": "ISO_3"})

```

```{python}
pop = pop.rename(columns={"Country": "ISO_3"})

```

## Ensure ISO codes are in uppercase
```{python}
pop["ISO_3"] = pop["ISO_3"].str.upper()

```


```{python}
area["ISO_3"] = pop["ISO_3"].str.upper()
```


## Merge population to area
```{python}
population = pd.merge(pop, area, on=["ISO_3","Year"], how="inner")
```

### Create and calculate population Density 

```{python}
population["Population_Density"] = (
    population["Total_Population"] / population["Area"]
).round(0).astype(int)

```

### Map Total population

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
import numpy as np

# Data for all countries in 2020
world_map_data = population[
    population["Year"] == 2020
].copy()

# Convert ISO codes to country names
world_map_data["Country_Name"] = coco.convert(
    names=world_map_data["ISO_3"],
    to="name_short"
)

# Ensure population density is numeric
world_map_data["Population_Density"] = pd.to_numeric(
    world_map_data["Population_Density"],
    errors="coerce"
)

# Logarithmic transformation
world_map_data["Density_log"] = np.log10(
    world_map_data["Population_Density"] + 1
)

# -----------------------------
# MAP 1: TOTAL POPULATION
# -----------------------------
world_total_population_map = px.choropleth(
    world_map_data,
    locations="ISO_3",
    color="Total_Population",
    hover_name="Country_Name",
    hover_data={
        "ISO_3": False,
        "Total_Population": True,
        "Population_Density": True
    },
    title="Total Population by Country (2020)",
    color_continuous_scale=px.colors.sequential.RdPu[1:6],
    height=800
)

world_total_population_map.update_geos(
    showframe=False,
    showcoastlines=False,
    showcountries=True,
    countrycolor="white",
    showland=True,
    landcolor="lightgray",
    projection_type="natural earth",
    showocean=True,
    oceancolor="#dff3ff"
)


world_total_population_map.update_layout(
coloraxis_colorbar=dict(
        title="Log Density"
    ),
    margin=dict(l=10, r=10, t=60, b=10)
)
# -----------------------------
# MAP 2: POPULATION DENSITY
# -----------------------------
world_population_density_map = px.choropleth(
    world_map_data,
    locations="ISO_3",
    color="Density_log",
    hover_name="Country_Name",
    hover_data={
        "ISO_3": False,
        "Population_Density": True,
        "Density_log": False,
        "Total_Population": True
    },
    title="Population Density by Country (2020)",
    color_continuous_scale=px.colors.sequential.RdPu[1:6],
    height=800
)

world_population_density_map.update_geos(
    showframe=False,
    showcoastlines=False,
    showcountries=True,
    countrycolor="white",
    showland=True,
    landcolor="lightgray",
    projection_type="natural earth",
    showocean=True,
    oceancolor="#dff3ff"
)

world_population_density_map.update_layout(
    coloraxis_colorbar=dict(
        title="Log Density"
    ),
    margin=dict(l=10, r=10, t=60, b=10)
)
```


#### Paises con mayor poblacion
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false

# Flter data for 2020 (all countries )
top_pop = population[
    population["Year"] == 2020
].copy()

# Convert ISO codes to country names
top_pop["Country"] = coco.convert(
    names=top_pop["ISO_3"],
    to="name_short"
)
# Select the 10 most populated countries
top_pop = top_pop.nlargest(10, "Total_Population")

# Sort values for better visualization
top_pop = top_pop.sort_values("Total_Population", ascending=True)

# Create horizontal bar chart
Bar_Top_Pop = px.bar(
    top_pop,
    x="Total_Population",
    y="Country",
    orientation="h",
    title="Top 10 Most Populated Countries in the World (2020)",
    height=700,
    text="Total_Population"
)

# Adjust layout
Bar_Top_Pop.update_layout(
      legend=dict(
        x=1.02,
        y=1,
        xanchor="left",
        yanchor="top"
    )
)
```


## List of selected years
```{python}
years = [1940,1950, 1960, 1970, 1980, 1990, 2000, 2010, 2020]
```

## List of selected countries
```{python}
countries = ["usa", "che", "fra",
    "chn", "ind",
    "bra", "col",
    "gha", "cod", "zaf",   
    "sau","nga", "are"
]
```

## Convert ISO-3 country codes to country names

```{python}
population["Country"] = coco.convert(
    names=population["ISO_3"],
    to="name_short"
)


```


## Filter data for selected countries between 1960 and 2020

```{python}
data = population[
    (population["Year"].between(1960, 2020)) &
    (population["ISO_3"].isin(countries))
]

```


```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false


import plotly.express as px
import pandas as pd

data = population[
    (population["ISO_3"].str.lower().isin(countries)) &
    (population["Year"].between(1960, 2020))
].copy()

data["Year"] = pd.to_numeric(data["Year"], errors="coerce")
data["Population_Density"] = pd.to_numeric(data["Population_Density"], errors="coerce")

data = data.dropna(subset=["Year", "Population_Density", "Country"])
data = data.sort_values(["Country", "Year"])

Line_Density_pop = px.line(
    data,
    x="Year",
    y="Population_Density",
    color="Country",
    title="Population Density by Country (1960–2020)",
    markers=True,
    log_y=True,
    height=600
)

Line_Density_pop.update_layout(
    autosize=True,
    margin=dict(l=70, r=20, t=70, b=140),
    legend=dict(
        title_text="",
        orientation="h",
        yanchor="top",
        y=-0.22,
        xanchor="center",
        x=0.5,
        font=dict(size=10),
        entrywidth=110
    )
)

Line_Density_pop


```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false

Line_Total_pop = px.line(
    data,
    x="Year",
    y="Total_Population",
    color="Country",
    title="Total Population by Country (1960–2020)",
    markers=True,
    log_y=True
)

Line_Total_pop.update_layout(
    autosize=False,  # 👈 CLAVE
    height=550,
    margin=dict(l=60, r=20, t=60, b=140),

    xaxis_title="Year",
    yaxis_title="Total Population",

    legend=dict(
        title_text="",
        orientation="h",
        yanchor="top",
        y=-0.25,
        xanchor="center",
        x=0.5,
        font=dict(size=7),
        entrywidth=100,
        itemsizing="constant"
    )
)

Line_Total_pop


```




















```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
Line_Density_pop = px.line(
    data,
    x="Year",
    y="Population_Density",
    color="Country",
    title="Population Density by Country (1960–2020)",
    log_y=True,
    markers=True,
    height=600
)

Line_Density_pop.update_layout(
    autosize=True,
    margin=dict(l=70, r=20, t=70, b=90),
    legend=dict(
        title="Country",
        orientation="h",
        yanchor="top",
        y=-0.28,
        xanchor="center",
        x=0.5
    )
)
  
```


#### Map


```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
map_data = population[
    (population["ISO_3"].str.lower().isin(countries)) &
    (population["Year"] == 2020)
].copy()

map_data["ISO3"] = map_data["ISO_3"]

map_data["Country_Name"] = coco.convert(
    names=map_data["ISO_3"],
    to="name_short"
)

Map_Total_pop = px.choropleth(
    map_data,
    locations="ISO3",
    color="Total_Population",
    hover_name="Country_Name",
    title="Total Population by Selected Countries (2020)",
    color_continuous_scale=px.colors.sequential.RdPu[1:6],
    height=800
)

Map_Total_pop.update_geos(
    showframe=False,
    showcoastlines=False,
    showcountries=True,
    countrycolor="white",
    showland=True,
    landcolor="lightgray",
    projection_type="natural earth",
    showocean=True,
    oceancolor="#dff3ff"
)

Map_Total_pop.update_layout(
    coloraxis_colorbar=dict(
        title="Total Population"
    )
)

```


```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
Map_Density_pop = px.choropleth(
    map_data,
    locations="ISO3",
    color="Population_Density",
    hover_name="Country_Name",
    title="Population Density by Selected Countries (2020)",
    color_continuous_scale=px.colors.sequential.RdPu[1:6],
    height=800
)

Map_Density_pop.update_geos(
    showframe=False,
    showcoastlines=False,
    showcountries=True,
    countrycolor="white",
    showland=True,
    landcolor="lightgray",
    projection_type="natural earth",
    showocean=True,
    oceancolor="#dff3ff"
)

Map_Density_pop.update_layout(
    coloraxis_colorbar=dict(
        title="Population Density"
    )
)


```



```{python}

life_expectancy = pd.read_csv(r"C:\Users\julia\OneDrive\Documents\GitHub\proyecto\ddf--datapoints--sp_dyn_le00_in--by--geo--time.csv")
```




```{python}
life_expectancy = life_expectancy.rename(columns={
    "geo": "ISO_3",
    "time": "Year",
    "sp_dyn_le00_in": "Life_expectancy"
})


```



```{python}
life_expectancy["ISO_3"] = life_expectancy["ISO_3"].str.upper()
```
```{python}
life_expectancy["Life_expectancy"] = (
    life_expectancy["Life_expectancy"]
    .round(0)
    .astype(int)
)
```


### Grafica de lineas para Life expectancy



```{python}
years = [1940,1950, 1960, 1970, 1980, 1990, 2000, 2010, 2020]


```


```{python}
countries = ["usa", "che", "fra",
    "chn", "ind",
    "bra", "col",
    "gha", "cod", "zaf",   
    "sau","nga", "are"
]
```





```{python}

#| echo: false
#| output: false

Life = life_expectancy[
    (life_expectancy["ISO_3"].str.lower().isin(countries)) &
    (life_expectancy["Year"].between(1960, 2020))
].copy()

Life["Country"] = coco.convert(
    names=Life["ISO_3"],
    to="name_short"
)

Life_Line = px.line(
    Life,
    x="Year",
    y="Life_expectancy",   # 👈 nombre corregido
    color="Country",
    title="Life Expectancy by Country (1960–2020)",
    log_y=True,            # 👈 mismo estilo que density
    markers=True,
    height=600             # 👈 igual tamaño
)

Life_Line.update_layout(
    autosize=True,
    margin=dict(l=70, r=20, t=70, b=90),
    legend=dict(
        title="Country",
        orientation="h",
        yanchor="top",
        y=-0.28,
        xanchor="center",
        x=0.5
    )
)
```




```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false

life_map_data = life_expectancy[
    (life_expectancy["ISO_3"].str.lower().isin(countries)) &
    (life_expectancy["Year"] == 2020)
].copy()

life_map_data["ISO3"] = life_map_data["ISO_3"].str.upper()

life_map_data["Country_Name"] = coco.convert(
    names=life_map_data["ISO_3"].str.upper(),
    to="name_short"
)

Map_Life_expectancy_2020 = px.choropleth(
    life_map_data,
    locations="ISO3",
    color="Life_expectancy",
    hover_name="Country_Name",
    title="Life Expectancy by Selected Countries (2020)",
    color_continuous_scale=px.colors.sequential.RdPu[1:6],
    height=800
)

Map_Life_expectancy_2020.update_geos(
    showframe=False,
    showcoastlines=False,
    showcountries=True,
    countrycolor="white",
    showland=True,
    landcolor="lightgray",
    projection_type="natural earth",
    showocean=True,
    oceancolor="#dff3ff"
)

Map_Life_expectancy_2020.update_layout(
    coloraxis_colorbar=dict(
        title="Life Expectancy"
    )
)
```



```{python}
merged = pd.merge(
    population,
    life_expectancy,
    on=["ISO_3", "Year"]
)

```

```{python}

countries_upper = [c.upper() for c in countries]

data_2020 = merged[
    (merged["Year"] == 2020) &
    (merged["ISO_3"].isin(countries_upper))
]
```


```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false

import plotly.express as px

Scatter_Density_Life = px.scatter(
    data_2020,
    x="Population_Density",
    y="Life_expectancy",
    color="Country",
    size="Total_Population",
    size_max=60,
    title="Relationship between Population Density and Life Expectancy (2020)",
    hover_name="Country",
    hover_data={"Total_Population": ":,"}
)

Scatter_Density_Life.update_layout(
    autosize=False,
    width=1000,
    height=650,
    margin=dict(l=80, r=40, t=80, b=140),

    # 👇 eliminar títulos automáticos
    xaxis_title="",
    yaxis_title="",

    legend=dict(
        title_text="",
        orientation="h",
        yanchor="top",
        y=-0.18,
        xanchor="center",
        x=0.5,
        font=dict(size=10),
        entrywidth=120
    ),

    # 👇 poner títulos manualmente donde quieres
    annotations=[
        dict(
            text="Population Density",
            x=0.5,
            y=-0.12,
            xref="paper",
            yref="paper",
            showarrow=False,
            font=dict(size=14)
        ),
        dict(
            text="Life Expectancy",
            x=-0.08,
            y=0.5,
            xref="paper",
            yref="paper",
            showarrow=False,
            textangle=-90,
            font=dict(size=14)
        )
    ]
)

Scatter_Density_Life
```











### Heat Map Pop/ Life Expectancy
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false

import plotly.express as px

corr = merged[[
    "Population_Density",
    "Total_Population",
    "Life_expectancy"
]].corr()

Heatmap_Correlation = px.imshow(
    corr,
    text_auto=".2f",
    color_continuous_scale="RdBu_r",
    zmin=-1,
    zmax=1,
    title="Correlation between Population Density, Total Population and Life Expectancy"
)

Heatmap_Correlation.update_layout(
    autosize=True,
    margin=dict(l=60, r=20, t=70, b=60)
)
```






# Overview Population 

## Row{height="40%"}

### BarChart 10 populated places 

```{python}
Bar_Top_Pop
```

## Row{height="60%"}
### Total Pop World
```{python}
world_total_population_map
```
### Density Pop World

```{python}
world_population_density_map
```

# Population overview Selected counties
## Row

### Line Chart Total Pop 12 countries
```{python}
Line_Total_pop
```
### Line Chart Density  Pop 12 countries
```{python}
Line_Density_pop
```


## Row

### Total Population Map
```{python}
Map_Total_pop
```

### Population Density Map
```{python}
Map_Density_pop
```


# Life expectancy

## Row {height="50%"}

### Life Expectancy

```{python}
Life_Line
```
## Row {height="50%"}
### Map Life expectancy
```{python}
Map_Life_expectancy_2020
```

# Relationship Population / Life expectancy  

## Row {height="50%"}

### Life Expectancy Vs Density Population Scatter 

```{python}
Scatter_Density_Life

```

## Row {height="50%"}
###  HeatmAP  relatioship Life expectancy / Population

```{python}
Heatmap_Correlation
```
